summary: Iteration 161: Complete testing of Quiz Edit with AI Verification and Quiz Correct Answer Bonus Points features. Backend: 10/12 tests passed (2 skipped - no unanswered quizzes at test time). Frontend: All UI elements verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: Quiz edit endpoint properly validates and applies AI verification
AI verification correctly flags incoherent quiz edits
Quiz correct answer bonus (2 pts) properly awarded and logged
Quiz badges (quiz_10, quiz_25, quiz_50, quiz_100) properly defined with quiz_correct_count condition

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/12 tests passed, 2 skipped - all quizzes already answered)

seed_data_creation: Generated and answered 1 new quiz for testing correct_bonus=2
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quiz edit with AI verification fully operational. Admin can edit quizzes with pencil icon, save triggers AI verification, issues shown in modal and quiz pool. Quiz correct answers award 2 bonus points with source=quiz_correct. Rewards page has 'Habits & Quizzes' filter showing habit_completion and quiz_correct entries with proper labels.

quiz_edit_endpoint.details: PUT /api/habits/quiz/admin/edit/{id} successfully edits quiz question/answer/explanation/topic with AI verification

ai_verification_response.details: AI verification returns {verified: true/false, note: 'issues'} - properly flags incoherent edits

edit_propagation_to_published.details: Edited quiz content propagates to daily_quizzes collection for published quizzes

approved_quiz_status_reset.details: If AI flags issues on approved quiz during edit, status resets to pending for re-review

quiz_correct_bonus_2_points.details: POST /api/habits/quiz/{id}/answer returns correct_bonus=2 for correct answers

quiz_correct_point_log.details: Quiz correct answer creates rewards_point_logs entry with source=quiz_correct, 2 points, metadata includes quiz_id

quiz_correct_count_stat.details: quiz_correct_count incremented in rewards_stats on correct answer

quiz_achievement_badges.details: Quiz badges defined: quiz_10, quiz_25, quiz_50, quiz_100 with condition_type=quiz_correct_count

rewards_page_source_labels.details: Rewards page shows 'Habit Streak Reward' and 'Quiz Correct Answer' labels for new sources

rewards_habits_quizzes_filter.details: Rewards page has 'Habits & Quizzes' filter category that shows habit_completion and quiz_correct entries

quiz_manager_edit_icon.details: Quiz Manager admin page has edit pencil icon on each quiz card in the pool

edit_modal_prefilled_form.details: Edit modal opens with pre-filled form fields: question, correct_answer, wrong_answers (3 fields), explanation, platform_topic

save_verify_button_ai_result.details: Save & Verify button triggers AI verification and shows result in modal (verified/flagged with note)

ai_flagged_warning_in_pool.details: Quiz pool shows orange AI flagged warnings when verification failed

habit_tracker_bonus_toast.details: HabitTrackerPage shows bonus message when quiz answered correctly: 'Correct! (+2 bonus pts)'
